MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS RICHARD WAXMAN AND IMRAN SAYEED'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6.

APPEARANCES: Kit L. Knudsen, Esq. of Commins & Knudsen, P.C. 391-6490 for pltfs & moving parties; no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: motion granted in its entirety, no opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kit L. Knudsen of Commins & Knudsen (391.6490) for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances. The court vacated its tentative ruling and granted Mr. Knudsen's request for a continuance. PLAINTIFFS RICHARD WAXMAN, IMRAN SAYEED'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 664.6 is continued to September 21, 2010. Mr. Knudsen to provide written notice of the continuance, and provide courtesy copies of plaintiffs' motion and proof of service to the court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
